requirements.summary: Update frontend Login page to authenticate admin using email 'admin@mathtutor.com' and password 'Admin@123'
acceptanceCriteria: Submitting the admin login form with 'admin@mathtutor.com' / 'Admin@123' does not show an 'invalid credentials' error.
On successful admin login, the user is redirected to the admin dashboard.
The localStorage fallback admin check also uses the same credentials ('admin@mathtutor.com' / 'Admin@123').
The hardcoded admin user record in the local store (store.ts) has email 'admin@mathtutor.com' and password 'Admin@123'.

file_operations.description: Update the admin authentication logic in the handleAdminLogin function to check credentials against email 'admin@mathtutor.com' and password 'Admin@123'. Ensure both the backend actor call (adminLogin) and the localStorage fallback use these exact credentials. Update error handling to properly redirect to /admin/dashboard on successful authentication.

Update the hardcoded admin user object in the initialStudents array to use email 'admin@mathtutor.com' and password 'Admin@123'. Ensure the isAdmin flag remains true and all other admin properties are preserved.
Update any admin credential checks or authentication helper functions to use email 'admin@mathtutor.com' and password 'Admin@123' for the hardcoded admin account verification.
